mustPass: Has a dedicated route for the company's offer and a dedicated route for production/process, since this industry needs more than generic service-business pages.
Includes home route with path '/' and a contact route.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Purposes and rules stay honest and avoid invented certifications, customer volumes or technical claims.
Routes and sections support both trust-building and lead generation for B2B manufacturing contexts.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the company like a generic local handyman or consultant business.
Do not rely only on team/about content; the scaffold must foreground offering, production and references.
Do not invent export markets, defense approvals, certifications or fleet counts.
Do not force pricing where projects are typically custom and quote-based.
Do not use vague section logic that hides what is actually manufactured or delivered.
